because.text: Adjudicated: jurisdiction root embedded in anchor-set blobs (your P1, carried 2:1, Book III s2 precedent); the sharper point - rev 1 never tied adoptions to the pinned root AT ALL - shipped as settlement-closure scoping. Competing-adoption divergence ACCEPTED but the smallest-WarrantID tie-break REJECTED: deterministic winner rules over attacker-influenceable ids are grindable position-selection (the ADR-006 fold lesson); rival authorized successors freeze the chain instead, resolution by settlement. Key-state refusal scoped to governance-policy warrants (your cut). Versioned trust config, pinned-vectors precondition (selftest now fully deterministic - fixed seeds, RFC 8032), N-M deadlock-by-design arithmetic all in. Book IV placement overruled 2:1 but its Book-grade conformance obligations travel into the GOV document.

subject.note: DeepSeek v4 Pro ADR-007 gate review 2/3 (blind): amend-then-adopt
